title: hieracium umbrosum subsp. jaceoides
intro: Hieracium umbrosum subsp. jaceoides, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial herb that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Hieracium umbrosum subsp. jaceoides is often prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
